Container.Name: nas-doctor
Container.Overview:
Sleep tight knowing your server never does.
NAS Doctor is a local diagnostic and monitoring tool for your NAS. Beautiful dashboards, Prometheus metrics (90+ gauges), webhook alerts — no cloud account required. Multi-arch: amd64 + arm64.
Features: - SMART health with Backblaze failure-rate thresholds (337k+ drives) - Drive replacement planner with health scoring, cost estimates, urgency classification - Per-container resource metrics (CPU, memory, network, block I/O) with history charts - GPU monitoring (Nvidia, AMD, Intel) with usage, temperature, VRAM, power charts - Backup monitoring (Borg, Restic, PBS, Duplicati) with stale/failed alerts - Network speed test with download/upload/latency history and speed service checks - Service checks: HTTP, TCP, DNS, Ping/ICMP, SMB, NFS, Speed with per-check intervals - Tunnel monitoring: Cloudflared and Tailscale (host + Docker detection) - Proxmox VE and Kubernetes integration - 3 dashboard themes with draggable sections and configurable column layout (1-4 columns) - Notification rules: 12 categories, dropdown-driven builder, one-click presets - Multi-server fleet monitoring with auto-pairing and visual topology - Webhook alerts: Discord, Slack, Gotify, Ntfy, generic HTTP - Export professional diagnostic reports (16 sections)

Config.Name: Host Mounts
Config.Description: Host disk mounts for per-disk space monitoring

Config.Name: Unraid Version
Config.Description: Unraid version file for OS update detection

Config.Name: Disk Slot Mapping
Config.Description: Unraid disk slot assignments for merged drive view (maps physical drives to array slots)

Config.Name: Sysfs
Config.Description: Sysfs for GPU telemetry and drive mapping

Config.Name: Scan Interval
Config.Description: How often to run diagnostic scans (e.g. 30m, 1h, 6h, 24h)
